user.title: PatchPilot
user.description: Pilot Home Assistant updates automatically during a maintenance window.

schedule.name: Schedule
schedule.description: When PatchPilot checks for and installs updates.

data_description.window_start: Updates only install between this time and the window end.

what_to_update.name: What to update
what_to_update.description: Choose which update entities PatchPilot manages.

data_description.include_patterns: One shell-style glob per line, e.g. update.* or update.router*.
data_description.exclude_patterns: One shell-style glob per line, e.g. update.* or update.router*.

install_behavior.name: Install behavior
install_behavior.description: How PatchPilot installs updates during a run.

notifications_history.name: Notifications and history
notifications_history.description: Run triggers, failure alerts, and run history.

error.empty_include_patterns: At least one include pattern is required.
